meta.title: Playa de San Lorenzo — Gijón, Spain
meta.description: Complete guide to Playa de San Lorenzo: urban beach with golden sand, seaside promenade, spectacular Cantabrian Sea views and family atmosphere.

hero.title: Playa de San Lorenzo
hero.subtitle: Urban beach with golden sand, seaside promenade and views of the Cantabrian Sea

about.title: Discover Playa de San Lorenzo
about.description: Playa de San Lorenzo is Gijón's largest urban beach, with over 1.5 km of golden sand and Cantabrian Sea waters. Perfect for families, water sports and sunset walks.

highlights.title: Highlights
items: 1.5 km urban beach with golden sand
3 km seaside promenade for walking and cycling
Blue flag for quality and services
Ideal for surfing and water sports
Children's play areas and beach bars

items.title: Seaside Promenade
items.description: Walk along the 3 km promenade with views of the Cantabrian Sea. Perfect for walking, running or cycling while enjoying the fresh air and sunsets.

items.title: Water Sports
items.description: Enjoy surfing, paddle surfing and other water sports. The beach offers ideal conditions for beginners and experts with surf schools available.

items.title: Beach Bars and Gastronomy
items.description: Relax at the beach bars tasting local tapas and drinks. Asturian gastronomy combines perfectly with the maritime atmosphere.

items.title: Family Areas
items.description: Children's play areas, complete services and surveillance in high season. The beach is safe and accessible for the whole family.

gallery.title: Photo Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Images of the beach and surroundings
gallery.viewAll: View all photos on Google Maps

images.caption: Beach view at sunrise

reviews.title: Real Visitor Reviews
reviews.declaration: Ratings and reviews from Google Maps (last updated: 2026). We only show a selection of verified high-rated reviews. To view all complete and most recent reviews, click the link below.
reviews.seeAll: View all reviews on Google Maps

items.name: María García
items.text: Spectacular beach with fine golden sand. The promenade is perfect for walking and the sunsets are stunning. Very clean and well maintained.

items.name: Carlos Rodríguez
items.text: Excellent urban beach with all services. Ideal for families and surfers. The atmosphere is very pleasant and the views of the Cantabrian Sea are magnificent.

items.name: Ana Martínez
items.text: I love coming here to run along the promenade. The beach is wide and clean. In summer it has a great atmosphere with the beach bars open.

items.name: Javier Fernández
items.text: Well-deserved blue flag. Clean waters, fine sand and complete services. Perfect for a beach day in the city.

items.name: Laura Sánchez
items.text: Beautiful beach with a promenade that invites you to walk. The sunsets are spectacular and the family atmosphere is very pleasant.

items.name: Diego López
items.text: Great beach for surfing. The waves are perfect for beginners and the sand is very comfortable. Totally recommendable.

address.label: Address
address.value: Paseo Marítimo, Av. Rufo García Rendueles, 33203 Gijón, Asturias, Spain

hours.label: Opening Hours
hours.value: Open 24 hours — Free access. Best time to visit is sunrise or sunset for the best photos and walks.

transport.label: How to Get There
transport.value: From Gijón center: 15 min walk along the promenade. From train station: 20 min by bus or 30 min walk. Direct car access with nearby parking.

parking.label: Parking
parking.value: Free parking areas available along the promenade. In high season (July-August) it can be limited — arrive early recommended.

accessibility.label: Accessibility
accessibility.value: Complete pedestrian access with ramps. The sand is compact and easy to walk. Showers and adapted services available in summer season.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how playadesanlorenzo.com collects, uses and protects your personal information when you visit our website.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect the minimum data necessary to provide our services. This may include: browsing data (IP address, browser type, pages visited), cookies and similar technologies, as well as any information you voluntarily provide through contact forms or email.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the collected information to: improve site content and user experience, analyze traffic and usage patterns, respond to requests and comply with our legal obligations.

sections.title: Third Party Services
sections.content: Our website may use third-party services such as Google Maps (for embedded maps and location data), Google Analytics (for traffic analysis) and Unsplash (for photographs). These services have their own privacy policies.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: Under GDPR and applicable regulations, you have the right to: access your personal data, request its rectification or deletion, object to processing and file a complaint with a supervisory authority.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: For any privacy-related questions, contact us at: n20186005@gmail.com

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By accessing and using playadesanlorenzo.com, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

sections.title: Use of Content
sections.content: All content on this site is provided for informational purposes only. We are an independent third-party tourism information site and are not affiliated with Playa de San Lorenzo management, any government entity or any commercial operator.

sections.title: Accuracy of Information
sections.content: We strive to keep information accurate and up-to-date, but cannot guarantee its completeness or accuracy. Schedules, conditions and services may change without notice. Always verify important data with official sources before your visit.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: The website design and original content are protected by copyright. Photographs come from Unsplash under their license terms. Google Maps data is used in accordance with Google's Terms of Service.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: This website is provided 'as is' without warranties. We are not responsible for any damages resulting from the use of information on this site, including, among others, travel decisions based on our content.

sections.title: Contact
